summary: Iteration 32: Tested bug fixes for one-off availability date display and lecturer collision checking. All 11 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend verified: Availability page loads correctly, calendar grid shows correct dates using local formatting, one-off availability dialog works, recurring blocks display correctly.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby warning in console for DialogContent - not blocking functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Bug 1 FIX VERIFIED: formatDate in LecturerAvailabilityPage.js (line 29-33) now uses local date formatting instead of toISOString()
Bug 1 FIX VERIFIED: DashboardPage.js (line 242) uses local date formatting for calendar date comparison
Bug 1 FIX VERIFIED: ProgramsPage.js formatDateForInput (line 307-316) uses local date formatting
Bug 2 FIX VERIFIED: check_lecturer_available_for_block in collision_service.py (lines 355-462) now checks both recurring AND one-off blocks
Bug 2 FIX VERIFIED: If lecturer has ANY availability defined but none for requested day, they're marked unavailable (lines 414-428)
Bug 2 FIX VERIFIED: If lecturer has NO availability defined at all, they remain unconstrained (backward compat)
Note: One remaining toISOString() at line 352 is correct - it's for Outlook blocks which are stored in UTC
Week view API returns recurring, one_offs, and time_offs correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes for one-off availability date display and lecturer collision checking verified. formatDate functions now use local date formatting. check_lecturer_available_for_block now checks both recurring and one-off blocks.

verified_features.feature: Bug 1 FIX: formatDate in LecturerAvailabilityPage.js uses local date formatting (getFullYear, getMonth, getDate)
Bug 1 FIX: DashboardPage.js uses local date formatting for calendar
Bug 1 FIX: ProgramsPage.js formatDateForInput uses local date formatting
Bug 2 FIX: check_lecturer_available_for_block checks both recurring AND one-off blocks
Bug 2 FIX: Lecturer with availability defined but not for requested day is marked unavailable
Bug 2 FIX: Lecturer with NO availability defined remains unconstrained (backward compat)

bug_fixes_verified.bug: Bug 1: One-off availability blocks show on wrong day (1 day later) in admin calendar grid
bug_fixes_verified.root_cause: formatDate used toISOString() which converts to UTC, causing off-by-one in Czech timezone
bug_fixes_verified.fix: Changed to local date formatting using getFullYear(), getMonth(), getDate()

bug_fixes_verified.bug: Bug 2: When a program has lecturer collision enabled, and no lecturers are available for a time slot, the booking system still shows it as available
bug_fixes_verified.root_cause: check_lecturer_available_for_block only checked recurring blocks, not one-off blocks, and treated 'no recurring blocks' as 'always available'
bug_fixes_verified.fix: Now checks both recurring AND one-off blocks, and if a lecturer has ANY availability defined but none for the requested day, they're marked unavailable
